case_title: KEVIN D. KELLY VS. CHRISTINE IKEDA

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON APR-17-2019 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF KEVIN KELLY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLY, KEVIN D. AS TO DEFENDANT IKEDA, CHRISTINE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLY, KEVIN D. SERVED MAY-06-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAY-06-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT IKEDA, CHRISTINE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELLY, KEVIN D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IKEDA, CHRISTINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2771 FOLSOM STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLY, KEVIN D. HEARING SET FOR APR-17-2019 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF KELLY, KEVIN D.
PAYMENT OF WAIVED FEES (APR-04-2019 FIRST FILING UD COMPLT 2,500-10,000) (CONFIDENTIAL) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KELLY, KEVIN D.
AMENDED SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLY, KEVIN D. SERVED MAY-06-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IKEDA, CHRISTINE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLY, KEVIN D. AS TO DEFENDANT IKEDA, CHRISTINE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: APPLICANT KEVIN KELLY PAID FEES ON 4/26/19. (206)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT IKEDA, CHRISTINE
